mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking_reservation (user_id, venue_id, start_time, end_time, status, cancel_time, cancel_reason, cancel_remark, verify_time, violation_time, violation_type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{venueId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, venue_id, start_time, end_time, status, cancel_time, cancel_reason, cancel_remark, verify_time, violation_time, violation_type, create_time, update_time FROM booking_reservation WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE booking_reservation SET status = 'CANCELED', cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_remark = #{cancelRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'APPLIED'

UPDATE booking_reservation SET status = 'VIOLATION', cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_remark = #{cancelRemark}, violation_time = #{violationTime}, violation_type = #{violationType}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'APPLIED'
UPDATE booking_reservation SET status = 'VERIFIED', verify_time = #{verifyTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'APPLIED'
UPDATE booking_reservation SET status = 'VIOLATION', violation_time = #{violationTime}, violation_type = #{violationType}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'APPLIED'
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM booking_reservation WHERE venue_id = #{venueId} AND status = 'APPLIED'
mapper.update: UPDATE booking_reservation SET status = 'CANCELED', cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_remark = #{cancelRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE venue_id = #{venueId} AND status = 'APPLIED'
